contexts.context: ...much aggressive jocularity.  Seeing the light through the <mark>sittingroom</mark> window, it was better to walk straight in...
...then to carry ones wine glass back into the <mark>sittingroom</mark> and wait while the Turkish coffeee ceremony was performed...
...a loudly argumentative individual who succeeded in clearing the <mark>sittingroom</mark> altogether as the gueests gradually slunk off to the...
